description_long: This object is a detailed model of a residential block featuring a row of attached houses, each with distinct facades and rooflines. The houses are arranged along a central street, with a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a variety of exterior finishes including brick, stucco, and siding. The block includes small front yards, driveways, and visible garages, as well as a green strip running through the center, possibly representing a shared garden or park area. Trees and shrubs are interspersed along the edges, adding greenery to the urban environment. The windows and doors are varied in size and placement, giving each house a unique appearance while maintaining a cohesive neighborhood feel. The overall layout suggests a planned residential development typical of suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A row of attached residential houses with varied facades, flat and sloped roofs, and a central green strip, set in an urban block with driveways and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facades of the houses, driveways, garages, and the main street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the block, the central green strip, and the rear of the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, rear entrances, and additional greenery behind the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the length of the block, the green strip, and the side elevations of the houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small steps or porches, and minimal decorative elements.
